---
title: "Talks"
subtitle: "Selected talks from the Rashid Lab"
---

This page collects selected talks given by the lab. Slides are embedded for browser viewing; PDFs are available for download.

## 2026

| Talk | Venue | Materials |
|------|-------|-----------|
| [Adaptive Trial Design for the RAS-Inhibitor Era](ras-inhibitor-era-trial-design.qmd) | NCI GI SPORE Meeting 2026 | [View slides](ras-era-adaptive-trials.html) · [PDF](../assets/downloads/ras-era-adaptive-trials.pdf) |
| [Staying in the Driver's Seat](../claude-code/code-ownership.qmd) | StatsUp.AI / ASA Webinar | [Guide](../claude-code/code-ownership.qmd) · [PDF](../assets/downloads/staying-in-the-drivers-seat.pdf) |

## Past

*Earlier talks will be added as they are migrated.*
